ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 127px; margin-left: 370px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
Normal steps — add in any order
(temperature must not drop without a Cooling step)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 223px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.hr:
Temperature 20–80 °C (5° steps), ≥ previous
(no time — ends at target)

No temperature · no time
Runs only if nitrogen is enabled

Cure / Bleaching (under nitrogen)Required after the purge
(parameters as in the states at left)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 482px; margin-left: 881px;

div.hr:
Required to vent the N₂
Cooling Mode · target below previous

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 646px; height: 1px; padding-top: 653px; margin-left: 48px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.br:
• Temperature 20–80 °C (5° steps) · NO user time (the operation function decides completion)
• Cooling target < previous step's temperature (5° steps)
• UV Intensity 5–100% (5% steps, Cure/Bleaching)
• Max 2 N₂ purges · N₂ runs only if nitrogen is enabled (no temp / no time)
